CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 9, 2024 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)
